meaning: A-L-M (the letter names Alif, Lam, Meem)
she/it was defeated (referring to الرُّومُ - the Roman Empire)
the Romans (subject of غُلِبَتِ - were defeated)
in (location in أَدْنَى ٱلْأَرْضِ - lowest land)
of the earth (after فِي in أَدْنَى)
the matter/affair (subject of this part of the ayah)
from (connecting قَبْلُ 'before' to what precedes it)
he becomes happy (subject of يَوْمَئِذٍ - on that day)
and He (subject of يَنصُرُ - helps/gives victory)
The Mighty One (a name/attribute of Allah)
he breaks/fails to fulfill (the promise وَعْدَهُۥ)
and yet truly (connecting to لَا يَعْلَمُونَ - they do not know)
of the people (possessed by أَكْثَرَ - most)
they know (referring to most people in لٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
they know (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in context)
the worldly life (contrasted with ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ - the afterlife)
the hereafter (contrasted with ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا - the worldly life)
those who are unaware/heedless (plural, in a grammatical state)
And did they not (think about يَتَفَكَّرُوا۟)
themselves (referring to the people being discussed)
he created (subject of the verb that created السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - the heavens and earth)
Allah (the one true God) (subject of خَلَقَ)
of the heavens (object of خَلَقَ - created)
and the earth (object of خَلَقَ - created)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
except (connects بِٱلْحَقِّ to what came before)
with/by the truth (in relation to خَلَقَ - created)
and indeed (connects to previous statement while emphasizing what follows)
many (describing how many people are disbelievers in لَكٰفِرُونَ)
surely they are those who reject truth
And did they not...? (connects to يَسِيرُوا۟)
so they may look carefully (at what happened to previous nations)
those who (referring to the people mentioned in كَانَ)
before them (referring to previous nations mentioned in ٱلَّذِينَ مِن)
a strength (as the object being described)
and they caused to stir up (acts on الْأَرْضَ)
and she/it(f) came to them (their messengers came)
their messengers (who came to جَآءَتْ them)
he/it was (describing how something used to be)
in order to wrong them (referring to those mentioned in كَانُوٓا۟)
and but/however (connects to فَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيَظْلِمَهُمْ - 'so Allah was not to wrong them')
he was (describes the state of عٰقِبَةَ)
Allah (The One True God who is the subject of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - He begins)
you all are being returned (to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)
and on the day (when تَقُومُ happens)
it/she stands/rises (subject of الساعة - the Hour)
their partners/associates (partners of the disbelievers mentioned in كَانُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ كٰفِرِينَ)
and they were (connecting to كٰفِرِينَ - disbelievers)
with their partners (referring to the disbelievers)
The Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)
on that day (when the Hour occurs)
then as for (introduces what happens to ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
they believed (connected to الَّذِينَ - those who)
so they (will be in a garden)
in a garden (connected to فِى before it)
they are being delighted (refers to الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا in this ayah)
and as for (contrasting with previous group)
by/with our signs (acted on by بِ)
then/so those (showing consequence for the disbelievers)
those who are made present (male plural doers)
and when (connected to تُمْسُونَ - you enter evening)
and the earth (affected by فِى/in from the previous ayah)
and in the evening (connected to وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ - and to Him is praise)
and when (time of تُظْهِرُونَ - you show)
he makes (something) exit (subject of يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ)
the living one (object of يُخْرِجُ - brings forth)
the dead one (possessed by/connected to something)
and he brings out (the dead from the living)
the dead (as the object being brought out)
the earth (object of يُحْىِ - he gives life to)
its death (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
and likewise (connected to تُخْرَجُونَ - you will be brought forth)
from (with emphasis, connecting تُرَابٍ to خَلَقَكُم)
dust/soil (as an indefinite substance, referring to what humans were created from)
when/whenever (introducing a condition that will happen)
your selves (referring to all of you)
so that you all may find tranquility (with إِلَيْهَا)
towards her (referring to spouse/mate in أَزْوٰجًا)
and he made (connected to خَلَقَ - he created)
between you all (referring to the spouses mentioned earlier in the ayah)
love (as something Allah places between spouses)
and mercy (as something Allah puts between spouses)
that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
of the heavens (possessed by/connected to something)
your tongues (part of وَٱخْتِلٰفُ أَلْسِنَتِكُمْ - and the diversity of your tongues)
indeed/certainly (emphasizes فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ 'in that are signs')
that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
and from (connecting آيَات with what follows)
your sleep (referring to all people being addressed)
in the night (connected to مَنَامُكُم/your sleep)
and the daytime (contrasted with بِٱلَّيْلِ - by night)
indeed/verily (emphasizes فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ that follows)
that (showing distance when speaking to one person)
he shows you all (object of يُرِيكُمُ in this ayah)
the lightning (object of يُرِيكُمُ - shows you)
in fear (describing how He shows you البَرْقَ)
and in hope (paired with خَوْفًا - in fear)
and then he gives life (to الْأَرْضَ)
the earth (object of يُحْىِۦ - he gives life to)
that (referring to the signs just mentioned)
surely for a people (who يَعْقِلُونَ - use reason)
they use reason (referring to people who reflect on Allah's signs)
and the earth (subject along with السَّمَآءُ)
when (followed by دَعَاكُمْ - He calls you)
he called you all (object of إِذَا)
and to Him (belongs مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
surely for him (belongs to him in this ayah)
the creation (object of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - he begins)
upon him (referring back to الْخَلْقَ - the creation)
The Mighty One (one of Allah's names)
The All-Wise (as a name of Allah)
he presented (an example for لَكُم - for you)
in (location within what رَزَقْنٰكُمْ - We provided you)
that which (refers to possessions in مَلَكَتْ)
in it (referring to مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ - what We have provided you)
like your fear (in comparison to تَخَافُونَهُمْ - you fear them)
like that, thus (connects to نُفَصِّلُ - we explain in detail)
the signs (that are being explained in نُفَصِّلُ)
any knowledge (in بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ - without any knowledge)
for them (referring to those who follow their desires without knowledge)
so establish! (command to one person, affecting وَجْهَكَ)
as one who turns away from falsehood (describes how to أَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ)
which/that (feminine, referring to فِطْرَتَ - natural state)
upon it/her (referring to فِطْرَتَ - natural disposition)
act of changing/altering completely (object of لا)
the complete way of life (subject of ذٰلِكَ)
the firmly established, upright one (describing الدِّينُ)
of the people (owned by أَكْثَرَ - most)
they know/are knowing (referring to a group of men or mixed group)
to Him (referring to Allah in مُنِيبِينَ إِلَيْهِ - turning back to Him)
and establish! (command to many people) (connected to وَٱتَّقُوهُ)
from/among the (الْمُشْرِكِينَ - those who associate partners with Allah)
into sects/groups (object of فَرَّقُوا - they divided)
with what/with whatever (connected to فَرِحُونَ - rejoicing)
they are happy (referring to those who divided their religion)
and when (introduces the condition of مَسَّ ٱلنَّاسَ ضُرٌّ - harm touching people)
the people (being affected by مَسَّ - touched/afflicted)
they called upon/prayed to (subject of يُشْرِكُونَ)
their Lord (who they call upon in دَعَوْا)
those who earnestly return (to Allah in repentance)
to him (they turn to him in repentance)
when (with emphasis, indicating a future condition)
when (followed by أَذَاقَهُم - He gave them to taste)
a group (subject of يُشْرِكُونَ - they associate partners)
so that they may reject/deny (connected to ءَاتَيْنٰهُمْ - what We gave them)
so enjoy yourselves thoroughly! (responding to their disbelief mentioned in لِيَكْفُرُوا۟)
then will (connects to تَعْلَمُونَ - you will know)
any authority/proof (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)
with what/that which (refers to يُشْرِكُونَ - they associate partners)
the people (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave them to taste)
when (followed by هُمْ يَقْنَطُونَ - they despair)
they see (subject of أَوَلَمْ - 'do they not')
The One True God (object of يَرَوْا - they see)
and he determines/measures (paired with يَبْسُطُ meaning "he extends")
indeed/verily (emphasizes the statement يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ that follows)
that (pointing to what was just mentioned)
the relatives (who are being given their rights)
and the son (as object of فَـَٔاتِ - give to)
of the established path/way (possessed by/connected to something)
that one (pointing to what was mentioned before)
they want (the وَجْهَ ٱللَّهِ/face of Allah)
face/pleasure (of اللَّهِ, being sought by يُرِيدُونَ)
and those (pointing to something far) (subject of هُمُ)
of the wealth (possessed by الناس - the people)
that it may increase (in people's wealth)
at, with, by (location relative to اللَّهِ)
you all gave (referring to giving usury in this ayah)
face/direction (object of تُرِيدُونَ - what you seek)
those who multiply (their wealth through usury)
Allah (as the subject of خَلَقَكُمْ - created you)
The One who (refers to Allah in this ayah)
he created you all (referring to all humanity)
then (after a gap in time, connecting رَزَقَكُمْ with يُمِيتُكُمْ)
He provided sustenance for you all (subject of يُمِيتُكُمْ)
then (connects رَزَقَكُمْ 'He provided for you' to what came before)
he causes you all to die
then (connects رَزَقَكُمْ with يُمِيتُكُمْ showing sequence)
he gives life to you all
that of yours (plural) (referring to the actions mentioned in the ayah)
and He is exalted (above what they associate with Him)
of the vast land (connected to فِى before it)
because of what (connects to كَسَبَتْ - earned/did)
of the people (connected to أَيْدِى - hands)
so that he makes them taste
who/which/that (connects عَمِلُوا۟ to what came before)
Travel! (all of you) (command to group before فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ)
so look! (command to all of you)
from (connects قَبْلُ 'before' to what precedes it)
those who associate partners (with Allah) (plural, being described)
so establish! (command to establish وَجْهَكَ - your face)
the upright, established (describing الدِّينِ - the religion)
a day (subject of لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ)
place/time of return (no return possible from يَوْمٌ - that Day)
on that day (when they will split up)
they (all) become completely divided (into separate groups)
so for their own selves (consequence of كَفَرَ)
so that he rewards (those who believe)
indeed he (subject of لَا يُحِبُّ - does not love)
the ones who reject/hide truth (object of يُحِبُّ)
as bringers of good news (describing the winds)
and so that he makes you all taste
and so that it flows/moves (referring to الْفُلْكُ - the ships)
the ship (as the doer of sailing)
by/with his command (related to تَجْرِىَ الْفُلْكُ - the ships sail)
and so that you all seek
and perhaps you all (expressing hope for تَشْكُرُونَ)
We sent (connected to وَلَقَدْ before it)
before you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
their people (referring to the messengers mentioned earlier in إِلَىٰ)
with the clear proofs (object of جَاءُو)
so We exacted justice (referring to Allah's divine justice)
they committed crimes (referring to those who rejected the messengers)
clouds (object of فَتُثِيرُ - it stirs up)
and then he spreads it out (present tense, following يُرْسِلُ)
in (shows location within السَّمَآءِ - the sky)
and he makes/puts/sets it (referring to the clouds in سَحَابًا)
pieces or fragments (object of يَجْعَلُهُ - He makes it)
then you see (connected to يُرْسِلُ - He sends)
the rain (object of يَخْرُجُ - comes out)
he exits/comes out (from the rain mentioned in الْوَدْقَ)
through it (referring to the clouds mentioned before)
and then when (connects to فَتَرَى - then you see)
he reached/struck (referring to rain reaching عِبَادِهِۦٓ - His servants)
he wills/wishes (how Allah spreads the clouds)
when (followed by هُمْ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ - they rejoice)
before (connected to أَن يُنَزَّلَ - that it be sent down)
it is being sent down (referring to rain)
before it (referring to the rain being sent down)
surely they were in complete despair
so look! (command to إِلَىٰٓ ءَاثٰرِ - at the effects)
the earth (object of يُحْىِ - gives life to)
that (pointing to what was mentioned before about Allah giving life to the earth)
we sent (followed by رِيحًا - a wind)
a wind (object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
then they saw it (referring to مُصْفَرًّا - yellowed/turned yellow)
becoming intensely yellow (describing what they saw)
surely they would continue/remain (result of رَأَوْهُ مُصْفَرًّا - seeing it turn yellow)
so indeed you (subject of تُسْمِعُ - cannot make hear)
and not (connects to previous لَا تُسْمِعُ)
you make hear (addressing Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
the calling out, the prayer (as object)
when (referring to وَلَّوْا۟ - they turn away)
they turned away intensively (subject of مُدْبِرِينَ)
those turning away (describes the people in ولّوا)
a guide (for the blind from their error)
of/from the blind ones (object of بِهٰدِ/guide)
with/by our signs (object of يُؤْمِنُ - believes in)
The one who (connects Allah to خَلَقَكُم/created you)
He created you all (Allah created mankind)
then (connecting جَعَلَ with what came before)
he made (referring to Allah making strength after weakness)
weakness (object of خَلَقَكُم - created you from)
and a single gray hair (as object of جَعَلَ)
The All-Powerful (as a name/attribute of Allah)
the Hour (as the subject of تَقُومُ - stands/occurs)
an hour (being acted upon in غَيْرَ سَاعَةٍ - not even an hour)
like that (referring to what was just mentioned about the criminals swearing)
they are turned away (subject: ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ - the criminals)
and he said (introducing what those with knowledge and faith said)
those who (subject of أُوتُوا - were given)
so this (connects to يَوْمُ which comes after)
of the resurrection (possessed by يَوْمِ - day)
you (all) were (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in يَوْمُ ٱلْبَعْثِ)
you (all) know/understand (in the context of those who did not know about the Day of Resurrection)
so on that day (as an adverb of time)
they are asked to make amends
we presented (examples to الناس - the people)
of the Quran (in this Quran - فِى هٰذَا)
from/of (connects كُلِّ to what comes before it)
an example (being used in the Quran)
with any sign (object of جِئْتَهُم - you bring them)
except, but (contrasting with إِنْ 'if/not' in this ayah)
like that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
he seals/stamps (subject of this ayah is اللَّهُ)
Allah (as the subject of يَطْبَعُ - seals)
hearts (of those who do not know)
so be patient! (connected to وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ - Allah's promise is true)
a truth (subject of إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ)
he surely makes light of you
those who (plural) (subject of لَا يُوقِنُونَ - do not have certainty)
